hook: AI gave you a 47-step plan when you asked for help with one decision. That's not help. That's homework.
caption:
AI gave you a 47-step plan when you asked for help with one decision. That's not help. That's homework.

Here's what actually happened: the AI doesn't know if you're a big-picture thinker who needs the 30,000-foot view first — or an executor who just needs the next three moves.

So it gave you everything. To cover its bases. And now you're more overwhelmed than before you asked.

This is the thing nobody talks about with AI productivity. It's not that the output is bad. It's that it's calibrated for a fictional average person who doesn't exist.

The big-picture thinker needs: context, why it matters, then a loose framework.

The executor needs: step 1, step 2, step 3. Full stop.

Same question. Completely different useful answers.

Your BootFile tells the AI which one you are before you even type the question. No more 47-step plans when you needed a nudge. No more vague "consider your options" when you needed a roadmap.

The AI doesn't get smarter. It just finally knows who it's talking to.
